name: Chicken Cacciatore
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onions in the bottom of a crockpot.
2. Add chicken pieces on top of the onions.
3. In a bowl, stir together remaining ingredients: tomato paste, mushrooms, salt, garlic, oregano, celery seed, and bay leaf. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
4. Cook on LOW for 7 to 9 hours or HIGH for 3 to 4 hours.
5. Serve over spaghetti.
